exam_price_notes: Exam-only fee $349. With study materials bundle $499. Prerequisite: active ACE-CPT or equivalent.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE test centers worldwide
Online proctored exams available through Castle Worldwide

id_requirements: One valid government-issued photo ID. Name must match ACE registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials permitted. No personal items allowed in testing area. CPR/AED certification required for all ACE credentials.
renewal_options: Certifications valid for 2 years. Renewal requires 20 CE credits and an active CPR/AED certification. Credits earned through ACE-approved continuing education courses, workshops, and professional development activities.

prerequisites.description: Active ACE-CPT or equivalent NCCA-accredited personal trainer certification

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between exam attempts. Full exam fee required for each retake attempt.

domains.name: Professional Conduct, Safety, and Risk Management

official_study_resources.title: ACE Exam Prep and Study Materials
official_study_resources.notes: Official textbooks, study companions, practice tests, and bundle packages
